test code, excluded from training data

PHPDoc declares $survey_queue as 'Optional' with a default, but the method signature requires it as a mandatory parameter (no default value). The documented behavior and actual signature are contradictory.

The null-coalescing/ternary fallback `$survey_queue ?: new Survey_Queue(...)` is meaningless since $survey_queue is type-hinted and non-nullable — a null value would cause a TypeError before reaching the constructor body. This represents dead/misleading code logic.
